summary: All diagnostics and persistence reload features verified. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All visual tests passed. GET /api/diagnostics returns environment='emergent_preview', git_commit, server_start_time, database.name='test_database', database.host='localhost:27017', state.trades_loaded_from_db=2328, has_persistence_reload=true. Overview page shows Daily P&L +$22.89, Win Rate 55.9% (204W/161L), Closed Trades 365. DiagnosticsFooter visible at bottom showing all expected data. Global Analytics page shows Realized P&L +$147.33, Win Rate 55.9%.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /api/diagnostics endpoint correctly returns environment, git_commit, server_start_time, database info, state counters, and has_persistence_reload flag (lines 383-416)
server.py: _detect_environment() correctly identifies emergent_preview via EMERGENT_PREVIEW env or /app/.emergent file (lines 124-130)
server.py: _detect_git_commit() correctly reads from env vars (GIT_COMMIT, RAILWAY_GIT_COMMIT_SHA) or .git directory (lines 88-112)
persistence.py: load_state_from_db() correctly reconstructs trades from MongoDB with win/loss/daily_pnl counters (lines 22-84)
DiagnosticsFooter.jsx: Correctly displays all diagnostic info with data-testid='diagnostics-footer' (lines 27-49)
dashboardStore.js: diagnostics state and setDiagnostics action correctly implemented (lines 46-48, 98)
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing MongoDB data (2328+ trades loaded from DB, 365 closed trades, 40 positions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Diagnostics endpoint and persistence reload fully verified. MongoDB has 2328+ trades, 365 closed (204W/161L), 40 positions. DiagnosticsFooter shows: emergent_preview environment, git commit 3e292f97795b, test_database@localhost:27017, boot time, loaded trade count, db-reload:on badge. Note: Railway production is running OLD code without diagnostics endpoint - needs GitHub push + redeploy. The emergent_preview environment has all fixes applied and working correctly.
